description_long: This is a multi-strand beaded necklace featuring alternating sections of turquoise blue and black cylindrical beads, interspersed with small white spacers. The necklace is displayed on a white bust stand, highlighting its layered drape and symmetrical arrangement. The beads are strung in three distinct rows at the front, creating a cascading effect, while the back transitions into a single strand. The turquoise beads are prominent in the lower strands, while the black beads dominate the upper sections, giving the piece a bold, geometric appearance. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on color contrast and repetition. The necklace appears to be lightweight and suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A multi-strand necklace with turquoise blue and black cylindrical beads, arranged in a cascading, geometric pattern. The design is modern and visually striking, with a strong color contrast.
description_view_0: Front view shows three cascading rows of turquoise and black beads, with white spacers and a symmetrical, layered arrangement.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the necklace's profile, showing the transition from multi-strand at the front to a single strand at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the single strand of alternating turquoise and black beads, with minimal layering visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, highlighting the necklace's curved drape and the way the strands converge at the back.
